title: Warning in large integers module attributes

features.name: module attribute with oversized integer literal
features.description: Code should include a module-level attribute with an integer literal that exceeds 64 bits (requires 65+ bits), triggering truncation warning in verinum parsing

features.name: wire attribute with large integer (no warning)
features.description: Code should include a wire-level attribute with the same large integer literal (10^19) that does NOT trigger truncation warning, demonstrating different parsing code path vs module attributes
